headline: Pentair to Release First Quarter 2026 Earnings and Host Investor Conference Call on April 28
summary: LONDON, April 14, 2026--Pentair plc (NYSE:PNR), a leader in helping the world sustainably move, improve and enjoy water, life’s most essential resource, will report its first quarter 2026 results before the opening of the New York Stock Exchange on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. The company will also hold a conference call with investors at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time that day.

headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on Pentair, Lowers Price Target to $110
summary: Stifel  analyst Nathan Jones   maintains Pentair (NYSE:PNR) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $126 to $110.
